ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who responded to the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "catching_covid" REAL /* Response to the question 'Worried about catching COVID-19' */,
  "infecting_ff" REAL /* Response to the question 'Worried about infecting family and friends' */,
  "worry_prisoners" REAL /* Response to the question 'Worried about prisoners' */,
  "feeling_frustrated" REAL /* Response to the question 'Feeling frustrated' */,
  "coping_changes" REAL /* Response to the question 'Coping with changes' */,
  "worry_colleagues" REAL /* Response to the question 'Worried about colleagues' */,
  "coping_staff_shortages" REAL /* Response to the question 'Coping with staff shortages' */,
  "low_mood" REAL /* Response to the question 'Low mood' */,
  "anxiety" REAL /* Response to the question 'Anxiety' */,
  "worry" REAL /* Response to the question 'Worry' */,
  "frustration" REAL /* Response to the question 'Frustration' */,
  "sleep" REAL /* Response to the question 'Sleep' */,
  "appetite" REAL /* Response to the question 'Appetite' */,
  "drinking" REAL /* Response to the question 'Drinking' */,
  "smoking" REAL /* Response to the question 'Smoking' */,
  "support_ff" REAL /* Response to the question 'Support from family and friends' */,
  "support_managers" REAL /* Response to the question 'Support from managers' */,
  "support_colleagues" REAL /* Response to the question 'Support from colleagues' */,
  "exercise" REAL /* Response to the question 'Exercise' */,
  "hobbies" REAL /* Response to the question 'Hobbies' */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the employee */,
  "survey_completion_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Location where the employee works */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift the employee works (e.g., day, night, rotating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., Mental Health, Coping, Support) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, Likert scale, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES survey_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "calculation_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES survey_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES survey_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the support channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support channel */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support provided by the channel (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support channel */,
  "support_score" REAL /* Score indicating the level of support received */,
  "support_date" TEXT /* Date when the support was recorded */,
  "support_time" TEXT /* Time when the support was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_support_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_support_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES support_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission associated with the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_reminders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
